title: ZXPong Visual Walkthrough
description: Take a visual tour of ZXPong and explore its gameplay, Solo Play, World PVP, achievements, and progression.
summary: Explore ZXPong through screenshots that showcase the gameplay, progression, and features that make every rally exciting.

images.caption: Fast-paced arcade gameplay begins with every rally.
Classic arcade action with a modern twist.
Compete, improve, and climb the leaderboards.

sections.heading: Take a Tour of ZXPong
paragraphs: These screenshots highlight the main areas of ZXPong, helping you become familiar with the game before or during play.
Follow the journey from your first rally through to online competition, achievements, and progression.

featureShowcases.heading: Experience the Action
featureShowcases.summary: Fast reactions, accurate positioning, and exciting rallies are at the heart of every ZXPong match.
body: The gameplay screen is where every rally begins. Quick thinking, smooth paddle movement, and accurate returns will help you build longer rallies and improve your score.
Whether you're playing Solo or World PVP, every match is an opportunity to sharpen your skills.
bullets: Perfect for quick sessions or extended play.

image.caption: Every rally is another opportunity to improve.

featureShowcases.heading: Master the Game
featureShowcases.summary: Learn the controls, improve your reactions, and prepare for tougher opponents.
body: As your confidence grows, you'll discover how timing, positioning, and anticipation all work together to keep rallies alive.
Mastering the fundamentals is the fastest route to higher scores and better online performances.

image.caption: Master the fundamentals before taking on tougher opponents.

featureShowcases.heading: Progress Through Every Match
featureShowcases.summary: Achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins reward every game you play.
body: Every completed match helps you unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and compete for longer rallies on the Game Center leaderboard.
The more you play, the more rewarding every match becomes.

image.caption: Every match brings you closer to your next goal.
